data.content:
Plan:
1. Rework `src/components/beat-state-overview.tsx` from stacked state sections into one compact column per state. Use dense tiles, tighter spacing, and column headers with counts while preserving detail-lightbox click behavior only.
2. Keep `src/lib/beat-state-overview.ts` grouping/filtering helpers intact unless the UI exposes a data-shape issue. Preserve lease filtering.
3. Verify responsiveness at desktop and mobile widths against the running dev server on port 4137, checking that the browser body does not overflow horizontally and no lease beats are shown.
4. Run repo gates: `bun run lint`, `bunx tsc --noEmit`, `bun run test`, `bun run build`.

Complexity: small/medium UI prototype refinement.
Risks: columns can create mobile overflow; tile density can make badges wrap awkwardly; all-state data can still include non-work rows if filtering regresses.
